# cycleShiftAll

Shifts all cycles starts and ends by a certain number of days, starting from the provided cycle onwards.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`CyclePayload`](../objects/cycle_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `input` | [`CycleShiftAllInput`](../input-objects/cycle_shift_all_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | A partial cycle object to update the cycle with. |
